name: ocean: NDBC buoy 46042 (live)
source_note: NOAA National Data Buoy Center — fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC — Data: NOAA NDBC (public domain)

water_temperature.para1: This chart shows 45 days of sea surface temperature, in °C, recorded by a moored buoy — 6,445 measurements, one reading every 10 minutes. This is real, live data from NOAA National Data Buoy Center, fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC.

air_temperature.para1: This chart shows 45 days of air temperature at the buoy, in °C, recorded by a moored buoy — 6,445 measurements, one reading every 10 minutes. This is real, live data from NOAA National Data Buoy Center, fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC.

pressure.para1: This chart shows 45 days of sea-level air pressure, in hPa, recorded by a moored buoy — 6,445 measurements, one reading every 10 minutes. This is real, live data from NOAA National Data Buoy Center, fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC.
